data.body: 6fe2 #764 patchset 2: LLM-Review +1 (code review PASSED again), Verified -1 but it's a FLAKE not my bug: failing test is tests/interfaces/store/test_enrich_drain_prune_concurrency.py (enrich-queue prune vs locked writes race, 123 lost) -- a known-racy concurrency test. Passed locally (30s). My 6fe2 commit (eac210b) is CLEAN of enrich/concurrency files. ROOT: origin/main advanced 9 commits since my branchpoint 8bb261c19 -> 89e59453, INCLUDING 9938a8aab 'route enrich-queue prune through locked delete_events' (the flake FIX) + an agents-md migration (CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md, docs re-home). My stack is based on pre-fix main so CI ran the flaky version. PLAN: don't recheck; before landing (Phase 6) rebase the WHOLE stack onto current origin/main (picks up the flake fix + main advances), resolve any doc conflicts, re-push, get clean Verified, then submit. Continuing to build e622/568c on the current base meanwhile.
